title: Creating AI Email Assistants with Neuron and Laravel
author: Rachel Kim
excerpt: Learn how Laravel Mail's AI assistant uses Neuron to help users create, optimize, and manage email campaigns through natural conversation.
content:
What if you could manage your email campaigns through conversation? At Laravel Mail, we've built an AI assistant that understands email marketing and helps you achieve your goals through natural language. Powered by Neuron, our assistant combines AI intelligence with deep email marketing expertise.

AI assistants represent the next evolution in email marketing tools—interactive, intelligent, and accessible to everyone.

What Can Our AI Assistant Do

Our AI assistant goes beyond simple chatbot functionality. It understands email marketing deeply and can help with complex tasks that traditionally required expertise.

Assistant Capabilities

Campaign Creation

Describe your goals and let the assistant build your campaign.

Copywriting Help

Generate subject lines, body content, and calls to action.

Performance Analysis

Understand your results and get actionable recommendations.

Automation Setup

Build complex workflows through simple conversation.

How Neuron Powers the Assistant

Neuron's agent system provides the foundation for our assistant. We use custom tools that give the agent access to your campaign data, templates, and analytics. The multi-provider support allows us to use the best AI models for understanding and generating content.

At Laravel Mail, the assistant can take actions on your behalf—not just provide advice, but actually create and modify campaigns based on your instructions.

The chat history system means the assistant remembers your preferences and past conversations, creating a truly personalized experience.

The Future of Email Marketing

AI assistants represent a fundamental shift in how we interact with marketing tools. Instead of navigating complex interfaces, you can simply tell your AI assistant what you want to achieve.

Experience the future at Laravel Mail.
